allow: Bash(python3 -c " import os, re emoji_pattern = re.compile\('[^\\x00-\\x7F\\x80-\\xFF]'\) files = ['index.html','qui-sommes-nous.html','nos-tarifs.html','nous-contacter.html','team-building.html'] for f in files: if os.path.exists\(f\): with open\(f, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as fp: for i,line in enumerate\(fp,1\): if emoji_pattern.search\(line\): print\(f'{f}:{i}: {line.rstrip\(\)[:100]}'\) ")
